name: Intertainment Media Inc.
summary: Intertainment Media Inc. engages in developing, nurturing, and investing in technologies in North America and internationally. The company also invests in social media platforms, which provide solutions for brands and consumers. It offers technology consulting solutions to clients and partners; and windrose global e-commerce framework comprising tools for multilingual marketing, shopping, and customer support that provide end-to-end multilingual e-commerce solutions for companies. The company is headquartered in Markham, Canada.
